name: Section 2503(c) Minor's Trust

eligibility.description: The trust must allow expenditure for the minor before age 21 and pass to the minor at 21 or to their estate if they die earlier.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows gifts to a trust for a minor to qualify for the annual gift tax exclusion even though it is technically a future interest, provided the assets are available for the minor's benefit and distribute at age 21.
